top_signals.title: Two More Oil Supertankers Exit Hormuz to Help Push Up Flows
top_signals.summary: Commercial shipping through the Strait of Hormuz gained modest momentum over the past 24 hours as at least two non-Iranian supertankers exited the Persian Gulf, the latest mini-flurry in energy flows transiting the vital waterway.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
